---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear description of what the problem is. Example: "I'm frustrated when..."

## Describe the Feature

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Use Case

Describe when and how this feature would be used.

## Proposed Solution

How do you think this should work? Describe the ideal behavior.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds?

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.

## Browser Compatibility

Should this feature work on:
- [ ] Chrome / Chromium
- [ ] Firefox
- [ ] Both
